mapper.sql: id, sys_no, biz_type, name, patent_type, dept_id, year, patent_no, certificate_no, apply_date, apply_no, ann_date, ann_no, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, register_date, ann_organization, score, our_unit_ranking, research_field, key_words, patent_country, division, scope, state, check_status, note, author_numbers, is_duty, sign_type, first_author_name, first_author_title, first_author_sex, first_author_type, in_first_author_id, in_first_author_code, in_first_author_edu_level, in_first_author_edu_degree, operate_time, file_ids, is_pct, pct_code, pct_name, pct_date, pct_priority_date, pct_enter_country, apply_info, cooperation_type, is_valid, end_reason, apply_id, serial_no, creator_code, creator_name, create_time
mapper.select:
select spi.id as rowId ,spi.data_status as dataStatus, spi.patent_no as patentNo ,spi.ann_no as annNo,spi.ann_date as annDate, spi.name as name ,spi.apply_date as applyDate,spi.apply_no as applyNo, spi.is_pct as isPct ,spi.cooperation_type as cooperationType,
spi.pct_code as pctCode ,spi.pct_name as pctName, spi.pct_date as pctDate ,spi.pct_priority_date as pctPriorityDate, spi.certificate_no as certificateNo ,spapply.id as applyId, spapply.name as applyPatentName, csy.code as "year.id",csy.name as "year.name",csy.name as yearName, sps.code as "state.id",sps.name as "state.name",sps.name as stateName, fdept.id as "deptId.id",fdept.name as "deptId.name",fdept.name as deptName, fuser.id as "subUserId.id",fuser.name as "subUserId.name",fuser.name as subUserName, csuo.code as "ourUnitRanking.id",csuo.name as "ourUnitRanking.name",csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName, spt.code as "patentType.id",spt.name as "patentType.name",spt.name as patentTypeName, csnl.code as "patentCountry.id",csnl.name as "patentCountry.name",csnl.name as patentCountryName from srm_patent_info spi left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=spi.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=spi.dept_id left join ct_srm_user fuser on fuser.id=spi.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=spi.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_patent_state sps on sps.code=spi.state left join ct_srm_patent_type spt on spt.code=spi.patent_type left join ct_srm_nationality csnl on csnl.code=spi.patent_country left join srm_patent_apply spapply on spapply.id=spi.apply_id where spi.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_patent_info
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select: select spa.id as id,spa.name as name from srm_patent_apply spa left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=spa.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=spa.id where eafrec.step_no>1 and ( spa.sub_user_id=#{userId} or spa.id in (SELECT apply_patent_id FROM srm_patent_apply_author WHERE author_id = #{userId}) ) and "2"=(select eafrec2.check_result from cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec2 where eafrec2.sys_no=spa.sys_no and eafrec2.check_rec_id=spa.id order by eafrec2.step_no desc limit 1)

select distinct spi.id as id,spi.name as name from srm_patent_info spi left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=spi.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=spi.id where "2" = (select check_result from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where spi.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=spi.id order by step_no desc limit 1)
